Lotus (Nelumbo nucifera) is a plant species with large aquatic leaves and showy flowers, native to Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory issues, due to its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties.
